TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == qnxan nya(qyanux nya) == Chris Anstey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1975, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, Victoria, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 213 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. Anstey maki cyugal laqi Isobel,Ethan ru Hunter. Isobe tmwang kneril hlahuy maki Australian . pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == qnxan nja(qjanux nja) == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ans~ɕtej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa melβourne, *iʦ~ʨtoria, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu portlan* trail βlazers~ɕ. ans~ɕtej maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi is~ɕoβel,etħan ru ħunter. is~ɕoβe tmwaŋ kneril ħlaħuj maki aus~ɕtralian . pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == qnxan nya(qyanux nya) == Chris Anstey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1975, byacing te 1 ru 1 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Melbourne, Victoria, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 213 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1997 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Portland Trail Blazers. Anstey maki cyugal laqi Isobel,Ethan ru Hunter. Isobe tmwang kneril hlahuy maki Australian . pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == qnxan nja(qjanux nja) == ʦ~ʨħris~ɕ ans~ɕtej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa melβourne, *iʦ~ʨtoria, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu portlan* trail βlazers~ɕ. ans~ɕtej maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi is~ɕoβel,etħan ru ħunter. is~ɕoβe tmwaŋ kneril ħlaħuj maki aus~ɕtralian . pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
